module_context.name: Infrastructure Services
module_context.description: Supporting infrastructure services including storage and configuration management. Provides foundational services used by other modules.
module_context.safety_class_rationale: Supporting infrastructure not directly involved in clinical decisions. Failure affects system availability but not immediate patient safety. Classification may change if clinical data stored.

software_items.name: object-storage
software_items.description: File storage service for arbitrary objects with AES-256 encryption at rest, organized into buckets with label-based metadata queries

core_functionalities.name: Object Storage and Encryption
core_functionalities.description: Stores objects with AES-256-GCM encryption using per-object data encryption keys

core_functionalities.name: Object Retrieval and Decryption
core_functionalities.description: Retrieves and decrypts stored objects with key validation

core_functionalities.name: Access Control
core_functionalities.description: Authenticates and authorizes access to buckets and objects

core_functionalities.name: Metadata Management
core_functionalities.description: Manages object metadata including labels for querying

core_functionalities.name: Event Notification
core_functionalities.description: Publishes object creation events for audit trail

module_hazards.description: Object stored with corrupted encryption key causing permanent data loss
module_hazards.potential_harm: Permanent data loss - configuration or files become unrecoverable

module_hazards.description: Key encryption key exposed compromising all stored data
module_hazards.potential_harm: All stored objects compromised - attacker can decrypt all data
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: System-wide security breach affecting all services using object storage

module_hazards.potential_harm: Confidential configuration or data exposed to unauthorized users
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Affects all services storing sensitive configuration

module_hazards.potential_harm: Database compromise - attacker could read/modify data and extract encryption keys

module_hazards.description: Service unavailability due to database or filesystem failure
module_hazards.potential_harm: Dependent services cannot store/retrieve configuration, impacting system function
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Cascading failures to rule-engine, actions, and other dependent services

module_hazards.description: Stale cached data returned to callers
module_hazards.potential_harm: Stale configuration delivered causing incorrect system behavior
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Dependent services operate with outdated configuration

failure_modes.name: Encryption key generation fails
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Object creation fails, error returned to client
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Configuration upload fails, dependent service cannot update config

failure_modes.name: Database connection lost during metadata save
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Save fails, rollback triggered to delete object file
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Object creation fails, client receives error

failure_modes.name: Decryption fails due to corrupted ciphertext
failure_modes.effect_on_module: GetObject returns error, data effectively lost

failure_modes.name: KEK ID mismatch prevents decryption
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Decrypt fails, object unrecoverable if KEK lost

failure_modes.name: Authentication credentials invalid
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Legitimate operations blocked if credentials misconfigured

failure_modes.name: Notification service unavailable
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Object creation fails, audit event not recorded

module_risk_controls.description: AES-256-GCM encryption with per-object unique DEKs
module_risk_controls.implementation: Each object encrypted with unique 256-bit AES key using GCM mode

module_risk_controls.description: KEK stored only in memory, never persisted
module_risk_controls.implementation: KEK loaded from Kubernetes secret at startup, unexported field
Decrypt validates KEK ID matches DEK before decryption

module_risk_controls.description: Basic authentication for all API endpoints

module_risk_controls.implementation: Direct queries use ? placeholders with args

module_risk_controls.description: Label value escaping for LIKE clauses

module_risk_controls.implementation: Context timeout (5s default) prevents indefinite blocking

module_risk_controls.description: Rollback mechanism for failed metadata save
module_risk_controls.implementation: DeleteObject called if metadata save fails

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Kubernetes secret rotation policy for KEKs
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Service cannot rotate own KEK without orchestration-level coordination

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: User permission management and credential lifecycle
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Service validates credentials but does not manage users

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Monitoring and alerting on filesystem capacity
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Service logs metrics but cannot implement alerting

cross_item_interfaces.name: Rule Engine Configuration
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Rule packages loaded from object storage. Failure prevents rule updates or service startup.
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: YAML rule package definitions, attribute schemas
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Rule engine has automatic retry, fails to start if persistent

cross_item_interfaces.name: Action Template Configuration
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Action templates loaded from object storage. Failure blocks action creation.
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Falls back to system default templates

module_verification_gaps.description: SQL injection protection via escapeString not verified
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add unit tests with malicious SQL payloads in label values
Add integration test forcing metadata save failure
Add integration tests for different user roles

module_verification_gaps.description: Notification service failure scenarios not tested
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add test mocking notification service failure

aggregation_summary.notes: Single-item infrastructure module. Primary safety concern is SQL injection vulnerability (critical) and encryption key management. Class A classification assumes no clinical data stored.
